positive: A stylized, neo-Victorian fantasy motif featuring entwined bioluminescent jungle flora and celestial astronomical elements. The central focus is a graceful, abstract depiction of a lunar crescent integrated into swirling nebula clouds. The style should mimic intricate etching combined with modern watercolor bleeding effects, utilizing strong silhouettes and high contrast. Color palette must be limited to deep indigo, ethereal sapphire blue, luminous cyan, and metallic gold accents. Composition must be perfectly centered, designed to wrap around an article of clothing, ensuring clean lines and visual impact from all angles. Isolated on a solid, neutral background for maximum print clarity.
